issues.description: Material fill is 60%, which might be acceptable but could lead to inefficient use of material and potential cost savings by optimizing design or using a more efficient material.
issues.suggestion: Consider redesigning for higher material fill if possible.

issues.description: The aspect ratio is 6.7:1, which might be challenging to machine with standard 3-axis tools but can be managed with 5-axis machining.
issues.suggestion: No action needed if the current setup allows for 5-axis machining.
